title: The Behemoth
creator: Jeanbeaux
list: [[A Grim Discovery]] [[The Fate of Thandros]] [[A Voice in the Dark]]
description: Having scoured Tyran Primus of biomass, the alien hive fleet moved on in search of other worlds to feed upon, pushing its tendrils ever deeper into the galaxy whilst the death screams of an entire world went unheard.
